name: mostParamSetString
title: mostParamSetString
syntax: long mostParamSetString (mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], char value[]); // form 1
long mostParamSetString (mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], long arrayIndex, char value[]); // form 2
description: Setting of parameters of the String type (for ASCII-coded strings only) or of the 'Enum' type in an AMS message using the parameter name from the XML function catalog.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message in which the parameter value should be described.

parameters.name: paramAdr
parameters.description: Identification of parameters (see Symbolic Identification of Parameters).

parameters.name: arrayIndex
parameters.description: Parameter index in arrays or sequences. This declaration overwrites the indexing in the brackets of <paramAdr>.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: String: Characters that should be copied to the message.Enumeration: Symbolic name of the parameter value.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
